title: vendor contianers/image with docker/docker/reference forked
body:
Also update docker version to 1.12.1

this is the companion PR of https://github.com/containers/image/pull/123

@mtrmac PTAL

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca runcom@redhat.com

comments.body: This seems to pull in way too much, including a pretty big part of `docker/distribution`.  IIRC in the earlier instance of forking `docker/docker/reference` we have eliminated the uses of `docker/docker/image` to not pull in so much.
